mission.title: clickhouse: Official ARM image for Docker
mission.description: Official ARM image for Docker. Requested by 56+ users.

steps.title: Check current ClickHouse setup
steps.description:
Verify your ClickHouse version and platform:
```bash
clickhouse-client --version
uname -m
```
This feature provides official ARM64 Docker images.

steps.title: Review ARM Docker image availability
steps.description: ClickHouse provides official multi-architecture Docker images supporting both amd64 and arm64 (AArch64). Use `clickhouse/clickhouse-server` (not the old `yandex/clickhouse-server` which may lack ARM support).

steps.title: Run ClickHouse on ARM
steps.description:
Pull and run the official multi-arch image:
```bash
docker run -d \
  --name clickhouse-server \
  --ulimit nofile=262144:262144 \
  -p 8123:8123 -p 9000:9000 \
  clickhouse/clickhouse-server:latest
```

For Docker Compose:
```yaml
services:
  clickhouse:
    image: clickhouse/clickhouse-server:latest
    ports:
      - "8123:8123"
      - "9000:9000"
    ulimits:
      nofile:
        soft: 262144
        hard: 262144
```

steps.title: Verify ARM image works
steps.description:
Connect and verify:
```bash
clickhouse-client --query "SELECT version(), hostName()"
```
Confirm the server is running natively on ARM64.

resolution.summary: ClickHouse now provides official multi-architecture Docker images (amd64 and arm64) under clickhouse/clickhouse-server.

prerequisites.description: Docker installed on an ARM64 or amd64 system.
